error_signature: Read/Write Files from Disk not outputting anything
title: Read/Write Files node fails to output data in background execution
symptom: The Read/Write Files from Disk node does not output any data when running in the background, despite working fine during manual execution.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
root_cause: When running in Docker, relative paths may not resolve correctly, leading to the Read/Write Files from Disk node failing to find the specified files. Additionally, file permissions and the existence of the files can affect output.
fix_steps: Validate the file path explicitly using a Code node to check if the file exists.
Use absolute paths instead of relative paths in the Read/Write Files from Disk node.
Confirm that the Docker volume is correctly mounted and that the files are readable by the user running n8n inside the container.
agent_instruction: Ensure you are using absolute paths and validate file existence before the Read/Write Files node.
